text:
NAME: CVRD_DAYS_IP_PSYCH_OVER_65 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
LT header 
VALUES: 
0–XXXXXX; may be negative 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 
COMMENT: 
If type of service code (TOS_CD) = 044 (Inpatient hospital services for individuals aged 65 or older in 
institutions for mental diseases) or 045 (Nursing facility services for individuals aged 65 or older in 
institutions for mental diseases) then value is equal to value of
